_schema: One JSON object per line — the code agent's structured cycle log (append-only). Fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), backlog_id (int, from BACKLOG.md), item (one line), files (list of repo-relative paths changed), gates ({import:bool, verify_storyboard:bool, verify:bool, code_review:bool, build:bool|null}), branch (autoimprove/YYYY-MM-DD-slug), decision (pr|discarded), pr (URL or null), notes (why discarded / operator follow-up). The agent skips any line containing _schema.
note: Seed line. Real cycles are appended below by the code agent.
